ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device that recorded the data */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "unit_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor data (e.g., m/s², °/s) */,
  "collection_interval" TEXT /* Interval at which data is collected (e.g., 1 second, 5 minutes) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, poor, questionable) */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during data collection (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version used during data collection */,
  "acc_x" REAL /* Acceleration in the X-axis */,
  "acc_y" REAL /* Acceleration in the Y-axis */,
  "acc_z" REAL /* Acceleration in the Z-axis */,
  "g_x" REAL /* Gyroscope data in the X-axis */,
  "g_y" REAL /* Gyroscope data in the Y-axis */,
  "g_z" REAL /* Gyroscope data in the Z-axis */,
  "unix_time" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the device is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Calibration status of the device */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "battery_level" TEXT /* Current battery level of the device */,
  "network_status" TEXT /* Network connectivity status of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor data used for analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., motion detection, anomaly detection) */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the analysis */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or method used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the analysis results */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device that triggered the alert */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assigned_to_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user assigned to the alert */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_assigned_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_firmware" (
  "firmware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware version */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device using this firmware */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the firmware was released */,
  "firmware_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the firmware */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog of the firmware version */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the firmware was installed */,
  "installation_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who installed the firmware */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firmware_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_firmware_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_firmware_installation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("installation_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the location (latitude, longitude) */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  "climate_conditions" TEXT /* Climate conditions at the location (e.g., temperature range, humidity range) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor data entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data entry (e.g., successful, error) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the log */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., device, server) */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "default_role" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
